content.en:
After this drop of the Three Realms Multi-Cultivation Refining Essence was thoroughly refined by Ye Tian, Ye Tian's cultivation was greatly improved in the early stage of the Third Realm.

In the years that followed, he had been refining the multi-dimensional essence of the Three Realms, and he was constantly looking for extradimensional creatures in the early or middle stages of the Third Realm, killing some extradimensional creatures of the Third Realm, and once attracted an incomparably terrifying Extradimensional creature of the Third Realm, causing his replica body to be severely damaged, and finally chose to self-explode to injure the other party.

Of course, he killed a lot of third-realm extra-dimensional creatures, which naturally attracted the attention of some forces, but fortunately, he had practiced the third layer of the Great Realm Armor Technique, so these forces couldn't deduce his traces, so naturally they couldn't find him.

Relying on the corpses of these third-realm extra-dimensional creatures, he used the multi-dimensional treasure bottle of the Moon Realm Lord to obtain a lot of three-realm multi-cultivation refining essences.

Moreover, he found that the aura of the Lord of the Moon Realm was increasing, indicating that the injury was improving, but he was still in the second realm, and if he wanted to rely on these three realms to repair and refine the essence to heal the injury, it was unlikely.

At present, only the Multi-Dimensional Healing Essence of the Three Realms has any hope of healing the injuries of the 18 Moon Realm Lords and allowing them to recover to the level of the Third Realm.

In the blink of an eye, more than thirty extradimensional epochs have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's cultivation has reached the peak level of the early stage of the third realm, and one more step up is the middle stage of the third realm.

So, he swallowed a drop of the Three Realms Multi-Cultivation Essence to impact the bottleneck in the middle of the Third Realm.

Rumble!!!!!

He struck again and again, and the indestructible shackles were gradually crushed by the energy of the Three Realms Multi-Cultivation Essence.

"Breakthrough!"

Ye Tian felt that his cultivation had skyrocketed, and his physical strength and strength had skyrocketed.

"Yes, the strength has increased by about fifty percent!"

This doesn't seem like much, but when it comes to the third realm of cultivation, every bit of improvement is very difficult, not to mention the improvement of fifty percent of the realm, for him, it is already a skyrocketing combat power.

In this regard, Ye Tian was already very satisfied.

After cultivating to the middle stage of the third realm, if you want to quickly improve to the late stage of the third realm, you need more three realms to repair and refine the essence, and it also takes more time.

"If it's like the time of the second realm, just a little bit of the second realm and more cultivation essence can be cultivated to the peak of the second realm, then it would be good!"

But Ye Tian also knew very well that the higher the cultivation, the effect of the multi-dimensional essence would definitely not be good in the future.

For example, in the fourth realm, even if there are four realms and multiple cultivation essences, it is extremely difficult to improve the cultivation, after all, the multi-dimensional treasure bottle is only one of the sub-bottles of the innate multi-dimensional treasure, and the effect will naturally not be so amazing.

If you reach the third realm, and your cultivation is still so amazing, wouldn't it be possible to break through the third realm of a superdimensional force to the peak of the third realm in a short period of time, and easily cultivate a large number of strong people.

"From the early stage of the Third Realm to the middle of the Third Realm, I spent thirteen drops of the Three Realms cultivating and refining essence, and thirty-nine extradimensional epochs. According to my calculations, if you want to break through to the late stage of the third realm, with the help of the three realms multi-dimensional essence penance, you need at least one hundred drops of the three realms multi-cultivation essence, that is, more than three hundred extra-dimensional era time. "

This is already Ye Tian's fastest ascension speed so far.

In other other third realms, if he wants to improve his cultivation, the time is measured in ten thousand extradimensional eras, or even one hundred thousand or one million extradimensional eras, and his cultivation speed is too fast now, so he will feel that a few hundred extradimensional eras are a long time.

But for the other third realms, hundreds of extradimensional epochs are really not a long time, that is, a retreat time.

"The improvement of cultivation is a little slower, but the progress of the extradimensional rules is even slower!"

Ye Tian secretly sighed.

He also used his multidimensional treasure bottle imitation to absorb the corpse of the extradimensional creature of the third realm, but the efficiency of transforming into the essence of the multidimensional rules of the third realm was very slow, and the transformation had not been successful until now.

Moreover, he didn't know what the effect would be after the successful transformation, and it was probably not much better than the essence of the multi-dimensional rules of the Second Realm, after all, this was just a multi-dimensional treasure bottle imitation.

this day.

Ye Tian's multi-dimensional treasure bottle imitation successfully transformed a third-realm extra-dimensional creature, condensing ten drops of the essence of the three-realm multi-dimensional rules.

He took a drop of the essence of the three-dimensional rules of the three realms to comprehend the extra-dimensional rules, and the result was as he expected, the auxiliary effect on him was really average, although it was still useful, but at most, he could only slowly improve his super-dimensional rule realm from the seven-point realm, and it was estimated that the limit was eight or nine-point realm, and then it would be equivalent to an ordinary auxiliary thing.

"If you let the replica body of the second realm enter the black mist stone statue area and continue to comprehend, with the help of this inferior version of the essence of the multi-dimensional rules of the three realms, there may be hope to raise the extra-dimensional rules to the realm of one percent. "

It's just hope, and it's going to take a long time, at least. []

But once the essence of the superdimensional rules is raised to the realm of one percent, a qualitative change will be formed, and this qualitative change will greatly increase the strength, which can allow the superdimensional realm in the body to complete a sublimation and transformation.

Moreover, the division after the extra-dimensional rules will no longer be described by silk, and the 100,000 super-dimensional rules will be fused together to form a super-dimensional rule 453, and then the super-dimensional rules will be described by one or two, and the seven super-dimensional rules can be comprehended, so that they can 100% break through to the fourth realm.

And comprehending the ten extra-dimensional rules can be regarded as the realm of twenty-dimensional super-dimensional rules, not that the ten super-dimensional rules that Ye Tian thought at the beginning are the ten-dimensional realm, and the extra-dimensional rules are not so simple.

Comprehending a superdimensional rule is the watershed of the third realm, and only by comprehending a superdimensional rule can the power of superdimensional supernatural powers be truly brought into play.

"The next goal is to raise the cultivation level to the late stage of the third realm, and comprehend a superdimensional rule!"

For Ye Tian, cultivation may be easier to improve, after all, he only needs to improve step by step, and comprehending the super-dimensional rules is relatively slow, and it takes more time to condense the essence of the multi-dimensional rules of the three realms.

......

Black Mist Stone Statue.

Ye Tian entered here with the cultivation of the second realm copying body, carrying some essence of the multi-dimensional rules of the three realms, and then began to comprehend and cultivate.

With a crippled black mist multidimensional body, he is not afraid of the black mist energy here, and as he continues to comprehend the black mist stone statue, his own extradimensional rule realm is also slowly improving.

If nothing big happens, all of his replica bodies will continue to retreat and practice like this.
